markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Interview Justin Collins for the Account Executive role at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/DJpKgx-Mvxjt_C2Nv4ds3WaT8Xp6WFhX?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - As Jasper's \#2 AE, Justin grew enterprise ARR from $50k to $32M by building a consultative sales process from scratch.
  - [Justin's key strategy was monetizing time savings (e.g., Pilot Flying J: $160k/yr saved) to build compelling ROI cases for executive buy-in.](https://fathom.video/share/DJpKgx-Mvxjt_C2Nv4ds3WaT8Xp6WFhX?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)
  - [GrowthX has high inbound demand but lacks a personalized sales experience; Tyler seeks a partner to build this and scale delivery.](https://fathom.video/share/DJpKgx-Mvxjt_C2Nv4ds3WaT8Xp6WFhX?tab=summary&timestamp=2975.0)
  - [Justin is excited by GrowthX's vision, which he sees as the product Jasper failed to build, and is comfortable with the early-stage ambiguity.](https://fathom.video/share/DJpKgx-Mvxjt_C2Nv4ds3WaT8Xp6WFhX?tab=summary&timestamp=2643.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Sales Challenge

  - [**High Inbound Demand:** GrowthX has strong interest from B2B software companies (e.g., Zapier, Brex, Webflow), but delivery capacity is the bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/DJpKgx-Mvxjt_C2Nv4ds3WaT8Xp6WFhX?tab=summary&timestamp=2681.0)
  - [**Need for Personalization:** Tyler's key challenge is building a personalized sales process (e.g., custom content refreshes) to increase prospect confidence, a task currently deprioritized to focus on client success.](https://fathom.video/share/DJpKgx-Mvxjt_C2Nv4ds3WaT8Xp6WFhX?tab=summary&timestamp=2975.0)
  - [**Ideal Client Profile:**](https://fathom.video/share/DJpKgx-Mvxjt_C2Nv4ds3WaT8Xp6WFhX?tab=summary&timestamp=2830.0)
      - [**Domain Authority:** Trust GrowthX to scale content without micromanagement.](https://fathom.video/share/DJpKgx-Mvxjt_C2Nv4ds3WaT8Xp6WFhX?tab=summary&timestamp=2830.0)
      - [**Content Type:** SEO-focused, not highly technical thought leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/DJpKgx-Mvxjt_C2Nv4ds3WaT8Xp6WFhX?tab=summary&timestamp=2830.0)
      - [**Executive Buy-in:** A champion who sees the vision and is a collaborator, not a roadblock.](https://fathom.video/share/DJpKgx-Mvxjt_C2Nv4ds3WaT8Xp6WFhX?tab=summary&timestamp=2893.0)

### Justin's Experience at Jasper

  - **Role:** \#2 Account Executive at Jasper, hired one month after the founding AE.
  - [**Growth:** Helped scale enterprise ARR from $50k to $32M.](https://fathom.video/share/DJpKgx-Mvxjt_C2Nv4ds3WaT8Xp6WFhX?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
  - [**Context:** The company's business model shifted from prosumer-heavy ($50M ARR) to enterprise-focused after ChatGPT's launch dried up inbound leads.](https://fathom.video/share/DJpKgx-Mvxjt_C2Nv4ds3WaT8Xp6WFhX?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
  - [**ACV Evolution:** Grew from an initial $15k to a $75k–$150k range, driven by adding solutions architect services.](https://fathom.video/share/DJpKgx-Mvxjt_C2Nv4ds3WaT8Xp6WFhX?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)

### Key Strategy: Monetizing ROI

  - [**Core Tactic:** Translate time savings into a direct dollar value to create a compelling business case for leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/DJpKgx-Mvxjt_C2Nv4ds3WaT8Xp6WFhX?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)
  - [**Method:** Use Glassdoor data to calculate the cost of equivalent headcount that Jasper replaces.](https://fathom.video/share/DJpKgx-Mvxjt_C2Nv4ds3WaT8Xp6WFhX?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)
  - [**Pilot Flying J Case Study:**](https://fathom.video/share/DJpKgx-Mvxjt_C2Nv4ds3WaT8Xp6WFhX?tab=summary&timestamp=1783.0)
      - [**Challenge:** Corporate skepticism toward AI.](https://fathom.video/share/DJpKgx-Mvxjt_C2Nv4ds3WaT8Xp6WFhX?tab=summary&timestamp=1796.0)
      - [**Land:** Won a \~$64k deal by building trust through hands-on trials and showing immediate productivity gains.](https://fathom.video/share/DJpKgx-Mvxjt_C2Nv4ds3WaT8Xp6WFhX?tab=summary&timestamp=1854.0)
      - [**Expand:** Used the ROI case (monetizing 3–5 hrs/user/wk saved → $160k/yr) to secure a multi-six-figure expansion, making Pilot a major client and public case study.](https://fathom.video/share/DJpKgx-Mvxjt_C2Nv4ds3WaT8Xp6WFhX?tab=summary&timestamp=1902.0)
  - [**Lesson Learned (ClickUp):** Justin missed connecting with leadership early, which led to churn. This reinforced the need for executive alignment to secure long-term partnerships.](https://fathom.video/share/DJpKgx-Mvxjt_C2Nv4ds3WaT8Xp6WFhX?tab=summary&timestamp=2115.0)

### Pipeline Generation

  - [**Inbound-to-Outbound Shift:** Justin adapted from managing high inbound volume (16 demos/wk) to building an outbound process from scratch post-ChatGPT.](https://fathom.video/share/DJpKgx-Mvxjt_C2Nv4ds3WaT8Xp6WFhX?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
  - [**Successful Campaign:** Created a 3-day trial campaign for churned/lost business prospects.](https://fathom.video/share/DJpKgx-Mvxjt_C2Nv4ds3WaT8Xp6WFhX?tab=summary&timestamp=1267.0)
      - [**Process:** Automated outreach → 3-day platform access with daily hands-on support from Justin.](https://fathom.video/share/DJpKgx-Mvxjt_C2Nv4ds3WaT8Xp6WFhX?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The high-touch, personalized experience built trust and converted prospects by demonstrating value directly.](https://fathom.video/share/DJpKgx-Mvxjt_C2Nv4ds3WaT8Xp6WFhX?tab=summary&timestamp=1498.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX Team:** Review interview notes and determine next steps in the hiring process.](https://fathom.video/share/DJpKgx-Mvxjt_C2Nv4ds3WaT8Xp6WFhX?tab=summary&timestamp=3154.0)
